category_sources: source_facts.description says Monika is synthetic monitoring; official Monika site describes Monika as a command-line application for synthetic monitoring.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monika; official Monika site and repository use Monika.
docs_sources: Official Monika documentation site at monika.hyperjump.tech provides overview, CLI options, and configuration guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Monika documentation and GitHub result identify hyperjumptech/monika as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies synthetic monitoring; official repository describes a CLI that monitors web apps using YAML configuration and alerts on failures or slowness.
